description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image. Define a single stage called triage. Add a dry-run:triage job in the triage stage that runs manually (except on schedules) and executes: gem install gitlab-triage, gitlab-triage --help, and gitlab-triage --dry-run --token $API_TOKEN --project-id $CI_PROJECT_PATH. Add a run:triage job in the triage stage that runs only on scheduled pipelines and executes: gem install gitlab-triage and gitlab-triage --token $API_TOKEN --project-id $CI_PROJECT_PATH. No caches, artifacts, or services are used.
